MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, CSR: David Davenport, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Appearances:
Robert Shepard, Esq. for Plaintiff Gopal Chopra
After hearing the evidence presented the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Gopal Chopra and against the defendants Bihn T. Nguyen and Bihn T.Nguyen DBA B. N. Diamonds.
Principal of $87,800.00
Costs of $302.50
For the total of $88,102.50
Punitive Damages waived, were not served on the defendants.
Judgment signed in open court.
